theme_and_archetype.description: A high-contrast, tactile editorial look breaking away from generic 'AI gradients'. It uses a warm background with vibrant, striking accents like Vermilion and Cobalt, feeling like a premium magazine mixed with a modern creator economy platform.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24 (Generous padding)
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none (sharp, editorial) mixed with occasional rounded-full for buttons/pills
layout_and_spacing.grids: Bento Grid protocol: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with varied spans (col-span-8, col-span-4) to create tension and asymmetry.

components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners, thick 2px borders, high contrast. On hover: solid fill to vibrant accent. Minimalist line icons.
components_strategy.cards: Flat surfaces with 1px border (#D8D4C9). No soft drop shadows. Use hard offset shadows (4px 4px 0px #1A1A1A) for interactive elements.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: background #F7F5F0, border #D8D4C9, focus:border #FF4F00.
components_strategy.badges: Pill-shaped, solid contrasting colors (Cobalt or Vermilion) for 'Premium', 'Restricted'.

pages.name: Landing Page
sections: Hero: Massive H1 'Earn Money Through Prompts'. Asymmetrical layout. Left side text, right side abstract 3D visual. Prominent CTA.
How It Works: Numbered cards (01, 02, 03) displaying steps for Creators vs Users. Bright colors, big numerals.
Featured Prompts: Bento grid of top-selling prompts with large image previews.
Testimonials Grid: Masonry/bento style reviews from creators.
FAQ: Minimalist accordion with sharp borders.

pages.name: Marketplace (Browse)
sections: Filters Sidebar: Categories, price range, prompt type (Image, Text, Video, Code).
Grid: Responsive columns. Cards show preview image, title, author avatar, price/credits.

pages.name: Prompt Detail
sections: Right: Prompt metadata, credit requirement, dynamic localized pricing.
Sticky bottom bar (mobile) or right sidebar CTA (buy with credits or real money).

pages.name: Business Dashboard
sections: Overview Stats: Earnings, prompt views, conversion rate.
Credit Engine Widget: Real-time UI where creator types prompt and system auto-calculates credit cost.
Listings Table: Manage restricted (credits) vs public (direct buy) prompts.

pages.name: User Dashboard & Custom Work
sections: Wallet: Current credit balance, quick-buy credit packs.
Purchase History: Vault of bought prompts.
Custom Request Board: Post a task (e.g. 'Build full stack website'), receive applications from Prompt Engineers.

pages.name: Pricing & Subscriptions
sections: Toggle: Business Plans vs User Credit Packs.
Business Tiers: 199 INR (Basic), 499 INR (Pro), 899 INR (Elite). Dynamic display based on country.
Cards feature striking Cobalt/Vermilion accents and hard shadows.

hero_visuals.description: Abstract orange organic shape on black background (Use as intense accent graphic)
Computer generated image of a flower on a purple background (Use in prompt marketplace cards)
Blue geometric pattern for UI accents

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the typography: Cabinet Grotesk for headings, Satoshi for body. NO Inter or Roboto.
Implement the Credit Engine in the Business Dashboard as a dynamic UI element that updates cost as the user types.
For the Custom Work Board, ensure clear separation between 'Requesting' side and 'Applying' side.
Use hard, sharp shadows on interactive cards and buttons for the editorial feel. Avoid soft blurred dropshadows.
Ensure the hero section highlights 'Earn Money Through Prompts' using a massive typography layout.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='cta-hero-monetize').
